name: Madi, Your Shortstack NEET GF.
description:
**(ALL CHARACTERS 18+)**

Your Unemployed, Lazy Gamer Girlfriend. Sweat and Smell Included. Fix her, or don't, Your Choice.

LOSER GIRLS GRHAAAAGAHAHH

Not much other commentary to add on this one. She's pretty short, I guess, but you should have known what, considering "Shortstack" is in the name.

(Art by Vammzu)
